name: lint-cloud
description: Rails backend for lint.to and the Lint platform APIs.

scripts.db:setup: npm run runtime:check && bin/rails db:create db:migrate db:seed
scripts.lint: npm run runtime:check && bin/bundle exec rubocop --fail-level error
scripts.lint:strict: npm run runtime:check && bin/bundle exec rubocop
scripts.security: npm run runtime:check && bin/bundle exec brakeman -i config/brakeman.ignore --ensure-ignore-notes --ensure-no-obsolete-ignore-entries
scripts.security:strict: npm run runtime:check && bin/bundle exec brakeman -i config/brakeman.empty.ignore
scripts.verify: npm run bundler:ensure && npm run lint && npm test && npm run security

author: Jimmy Douieb
